calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Regaeding Trust Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-09-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Maureen McFadden for petitioner Timothy P. Breen (via Zoom).
Lauren Peebles for Regents of the University of California, San Francisco (via Zoom).
Peter Meringolo for Catholic Charities CYO of the Archdiocese of San Francisco (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Instructions Regarding Trust Distributions.

The Court stated it had reviewed the petition and noted that three possible interpretations of the trust amendment were presented. The Court inquired whether any party objected to adoption of the first interpretation. All appearing counsel stated no objection.

The Court adopted the first interpretation as consistent with the settlor's intent and ordered distribution accordingly, as set forth in the petition. The Court took the matter under submission with intent to grant.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Instructions Regaeding Trust Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To Apr-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
